text.title: observability-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for observability-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Storing all traces at 100% sample rate without tail sampling or retention tiers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: At 10k req/s, 100% trace storage can cost 10-50x more than a 5% probabilistic + error-always strategy, with no diagnostic benefit for the 95% of successful traces.
